chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-902 of 2023 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) DIRECTIONS. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of Misc. No.10862/26 3. For hearing of main case. 27.10.2025. Mr. S. Shakeel Islam Shahid, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Rajesh Kumar & Ms. Humaira Jatoi, Advocates for Respondent Ms. Saima Imdad, Assistant Advocate General Sindh ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition as the he has satisfied with the final seniority list which has now been issued by the department. As such the petition is become infructuous and is hereby dismissed as not pressed alongwith pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
